claims.quote: At AdventHealth, we believe that exceptional physicians don’t just heal patients—they transform communities. claims.quote:
Visa Sponsorship: H-1B Specialty Occupation
H-1B visas are authorized through USCIS and permits temporary employment in the U.S. for foreign nationals who intend to work in a specialty occupation. To qualify as an H-1B holding Medical Resident you MUST pass all three steps of Medical Licensing Examination (USLME) prior to AdventHealth filing your H1B petition.
claims.claimText: AdventHealth sponsors H-1B specialty occupation visas for medical residents who have passed all three USMLE steps prior to petition filing.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: H-1B sponsorship for medical residents is a residency-stage trainee benefit.
claims.visibilityRationale: source scope HEALTH_SYSTEM_LEVEL cannot prove campus-specific availability without campusApplicabilityProof

claims.quote: For Post 9/11 GI Bill® (Ch 33) students and VA Vocational Rehabilitation and Employment (Ch 31) students, our tuition policy complies with 38 USC 3679(e) which means Post 9/11 and Vocational Rehabilitation and Employment students will not be charged or otherwise penalized due to a delay in VA tuition and fee payments.
